top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element = 'c'
    AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element = 'c'
    AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
);

SELECT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
EXCEPT
SELECT m2.molecule_id, m2.label
FROM molecule m2
JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
WHERE a2.element = 'c'
AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%';

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element = 'c'
    AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
);

SELECT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
EXCEPT
SELECT m2.molecule_id, m2.label
FROM molecule m2
JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
WHERE a2.element = 'c'
AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%';

SELECT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
AND m.label NOT LIKE '%carcinogen%';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'c'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element = 'c'
    AND m2.label LIKE '%carcinogen%'
);
